text: Being here, outside the glass-walled room, I sense anticipation mingled with curiosity. The ambient glow and the quiet hum of technology hint at creativity and innovation within. I feel slightly detached, yet intrigued, as if on the threshold of entering a space charged with ideas and possibilities. The reflection in the glass merges inside and out—I am both an observer and a potential participant, drawn in by the promise of exploration and discovery.
